examples: We studied the interaction between a typhoon and a cyclonic vortex.
The anticyclone weather situations are more favorable than the cyclonic ones.
The GRS is actually a massive anti-cyclonic vortex large enough to engulf several Earths.
Like maybe a headline proclaiming "Record Low 2009 and 2010 Cyclonic Activity Reported: Global Warming Theorists Perplexed"?
There is an alternative metric called accumulated cyclonic energy, which is essentially an integral over time of hurricane strength, whether they hit land or not.
